description_long: This is a modern, sporty coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in a pale yellow color. The front features an aggressive grille, sculpted hood with a central vent, and angular headlights, giving it a performance-oriented appearance. The side profile reveals two doors, blacked-out wheels with red brake calipers, and a gently sloping fastback roofline that flows smoothly into the rear. The rear is characterized by three vertical taillights on each side, a subtle integrated spoiler, and a black lower bumper. The windows are tinted blue, and the car sits low to the ground, emphasizing its athletic stance. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle, likely inspired by the Ford Mustang GT.
description: A sleek, pale yellow coupe car with a fastback roofline, aggressive front grille, and sporty black wheels with red brake calipers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, sculpted hood with vent, and angular headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, sloping roofline, and black wheels with red calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the triple vertical taillights, integrated spoiler, and black lower bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe silhouette and sporty wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
